sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Guard/Block
special_mechanics.description: Player can block attacks with guard button. Timing guard correctly allows arm grab on certain enemies (Williams, Roper, Steve, Jackson, Chin brothers), leaving enemies vulnerable to successive attacks.

special_mechanics.name: Dragon Power Gauge
special_mechanics.description: Gauge fills by holding L or R buttons. Special attacks vary by accumulated power, including flying hurricane kick. When completely filled, regular attacks gain extra strength for limited period.

special_mechanics.name: Flying Hurricane Kick
special_mechanics.description: Special attack available when Dragon Power gauge reaches certain thresholds.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics but no quantitative physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values, frame data, or sub-pixel precision). Character differentiation noted (Billy: agility/flexibility focused; Jimmy: strength focused) but no numerical movement differences documented.
